is_p_falciparum.evidence: Study of Plasmodium falciparum malaria in 903 individuals; abstract and throughout reference P. falciparum drug resistance.

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: Numerator/denominator and percentages given, e.g. R622I 369/833 (44.3%); dhfr N51I 99.4%, dhps A437G 88.8%, K540E 89.1%; crt CVIET 98.1%. Supplementary Tables S1-S6 provide per-locus counts.

sub_country_location.evidence: Data resolved to two districts (Gondar Zuria, Tach Armachiho) and 26 Kebeles (villages); Table S2 (district), Table S3 (per Kebele) provide sub-national breakdowns.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: Samples collected Nov 1, 2022 to Oct 31, 2023 (one year); monthly prevalence reported (Tables S4-S6, Figure 5), well within 3-year window.

african_field_samples.evidence: Field/clinical isolates collected from microscopy-confirmed P. falciparum patients at health centers in Amhara region, northwest Ethiopia.

is_primary_study.evidence: Primary genomic surveillance study using MIP targeted sequencing and WGS of newly collected field samples.

duplicate_risk.evidence: Funded as part of the East Africa Consortium for Clinical Research (EACCR) and same research group (Bailey/Fola) that produced prior Ethiopia surveillance (Fola et al. 2023, Brhane et al. 2024); this appears to be a distinct new one-year collection in specific districts, but overlaps with region-wide Amhara surveillance efforts are possible.

supplement.evidence: Per-Kebele and monthly per-locus frequency counts are in 'Supplementary Table 1-6' and 'Supplementary Data 1' compiled in an excel sheet not included in the provided document; finer village-level frequencies for all markers reside there.

assessment.summary: Primary genomic surveillance study of P. falciparum in Gondar Zuria and Tach Armachiho districts (Amhara, NW Ethiopia), Nov 2022-Oct 2023, sequencing k13, mdr1, crt, dhfr, dhps via MIPs. Reports extractable per-locus frequencies for numerous target markers with district-, Kebele-, and monthly-level resolution. Meets all eligibility criteria.
